package handler

import (
    "context"
    "database/sql"
    "fmt"
    "github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
    "gorm.io/gorm"
    "log"
    "net/http"
    "strings"
)

// Negative scenario for errgroup_fanout_without_limit_in_handler: preferred concrete example for this rule.
// Rule intent: errgroup goroutine fanout without a visible concurrency limit in handlers.
type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerDTO struct {
    ID string `json:"id" form:"id" uri:"id"`
    TenantID string `json:"tenant_id" form:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `json:"status,omitempty" binding:"required"`
    Amount int `json:"amount"`
    Payload []byte `json:"payload"`
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerModel struct {
    ID string `gorm:"column:id" json:"id"`
    TenantID string `gorm:"column:tenant_id" json:"tenant_id"`
    Status string `gorm:"column:status" json:"status"`
    DeletedAt sql.NullTime `json:"deleted_at,omitempty"`
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerRepository struct {
    db *gorm.DB
    sql *sql.DB
    cache map[string]CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerModel
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerService struct {
    repo *CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerRepository
    client *http.Client
    logger *log.Logger
    cfg map[string]string
}

type CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerAuditSink interface {
    Record(context.Context, string, map[string]string) error
}

func NegativeErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandler(c *gin.Context, ctx context.Context, db *gorm.DB, sqlDB *sql.DB, client *http.Client, input string, items []CaseErrgroupFanoutWithoutLimitInHandlerDTO) error {
    focus := "errgroup_fanout_without_limit_in"
    _ = focus
    errgroup_fanout_limit_handler_negative := map[string]int{"errgroup": 1, "fanout": 2, "limit": 3, "handler": 4}
    errgroup_fanout_limit_handler_negative["signal"] = len(input) + len(items)
    errgroup_negative_0 := errgroup_fanout_limit_handler_negative["errgroup"] + len(input)
    _ = errgroup_negative_0
    fanout_negative_1 := errgroup_fanout_limit_handler_negative["fanout"] + len(input)
    _ = fanout_negative_1
    limit_negative_2 := errgroup_fanout_limit_handler_negative["limit"] + len(input)
    _ = limit_negative_2
    handler_negative_3 := c.FullPath() + ":" + input
    _ = handler_negative_3
    return nil
}
